title: DeckManifest
description: Portable, self-contained deck export. One JSON file containing the deck spec + every slide spec inlined. Used to move presentations between projects via the controller's Deck menu (export / import). Image paths inside slides are NOT inlined — they must be resolvable in the destination project, or replaced with absolute URLs before export.

manifestVersion.description: Format version. Bumped when the shape changes in a breaking way.

exportedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp produced at export time.

source.description: Originating deck slug — informational, not used for routing.

deck.description: The deck-level spec. The `slides` array of basenames inside `deck` should match the inlined slides below in count and order.

slides.description: Every slide in the deck, in display order. Includes disabled slides (`enabled: false`) so they survive the round-trip.
